card.name: Gallant Soul
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Skykelp Guardian
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, you gain 2 life and scry 1.

card.name: Sonic Rollerblader
card.text: Tactical (At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may tap this creature. If you do, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains the following abilities until end of turn.) First strike, haste

card.name: Tempest Surge
card.text: Teamwork 3 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more.) Draw two cards. If this spell was cast using teamwork, it deals damage to each opponent equal to the number of cards in your hand. Otherwise, it deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Reformed Pragmatist
card.text: Deathtouch Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Busy City Square
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {2}{W}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Acid Vats
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. {2}{B}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. When it dies this turn, each opponent loses 2 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bountiful Orchard
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. {2}{G}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains vigilance until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Radioactive Mines
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {2}{U}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains menace until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Mystical Marsh
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {2}{G}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of one or two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Blue Skies, Aerial Ace
Green Thumb, Phytomistress
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, put two +1/+1 counters on target land you control. If that spell had mana value 8 or greater, double the number of +1/+1 counters on that land. {T}: Add one mana of any color. {T}: Target land you control becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with vigilance and haste until end of turn. It's still a land. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Black Sheep, Shining Beacon
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Whenever Black Sheep deals combat damage to an opponent, put target creature card from that player's graveyard onto the battlefield tapped under your control. That creature is a Hero in addition to its other types and gains "If this creature would die, put it on the bottom of its owner's library instead."

card.name: Red Hot, Blazing Streak
card.text: Double strike, menace, haste Whenever you attack for the first time each turn, untap each creature you control with first strike, double strike, flash, menace, haste, or tactical. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: White Knight, Sentinel Supreme
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink You and other creatures you control have hexproof. White Knight assigns combat damage equal to her toughness rather than her power.

card.name: The Terminus of Return
card.text: Indestructible {T}: Add {B}. {6}{B}, {T}, Exile a creature you control: Harness The Terminus of Return. (Once harnessed, its Origin ability is active.) Origin — At the beginning of your upkeep, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: The Terminus of Apparition
card.text: Indestructible {T}: Add {W}. {5}{W}, {T}: Harness The Terminus of Apparition. (Once harnessed, its Origin ability is active.) Origin — At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one other target nonland permanent you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Kavaero, Mind-Bitten
card.text: You may have Kavaero enter as a copy of any creature card in a graveyard, except his name is Kavaero, Mind-Bitten and he's a 4/4 Spider Human Hero in addition to his other types. When you do, exile that card.

card.name: Egrix the Bile Bulwark
card.text: Deathtouch, lifelink Whenever Egrix attacks, until end of turn you may look at the top card of your library any time and you may play cards from the top of your library. If you cast a spell this way, pay life equal to its mana value rather than pay its mana cost.

card.name: Verilax the Havenskin
card.text: When Verilax enters, if he was cast, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. If damage would be dealt to Verilax, prevent that damage and put that many +1/+1 counters on him.

card.name: Druneth, Reviver of the Hive
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast a creature spell with mana value equal to Druneth's power, copy that spell, except the copy isn't legendary. Then put a +1/+1 counter on Druneth. (The copy becomes a token.)

card.name: Bayo, Irritable Instructor
card.text: Flying You don't lose unspent red mana as steps and phases end. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, add {R}. When Bayo leaves the battlefield, you may pay {X}. When you do, he deals X damage to target player.

card.name: Withar, Cocoon Keeper
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink When Withar enters, you may exchange your life total with target opponent. If you lose life this way, draw that many cards.

card.name: Hex of Undeath
card.text: Return up to six target creature cards with different names from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Impostor Syndrome
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary.

card.name: Through the Omenpath
card.text: Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, look at the top five cards of your library. You may put a creature card from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Lady Gore, Death's Edge
card.text: First strike Players can't gain life. Damage can't be prevented. Whenever a creature blocks, Lady Gore deals 1 damage to that creature's controller.

card.name: The Immense, Failed Experiment
card.text: The Immense enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. Whenever The Immense deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Then if the number of cards in your hand is greater than its power, put a +1/+1 counter on The Immense.

card.name: 5P-4M, Evil Supercomputer
card.text: Defender, haste {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card. {T}, Discard a blue card: Untap two other target nonland permanents you control. {T}, Discard a red card: Create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Erdia Raxx, Humble CEO
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice another nontoken creature, create a 1/1 white Citizen creature token. Exhaust — Tap 10 untapped creatures you control: Your life total becomes equal to twice your starting life total. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

card.name: Vox Dei, Hallowed Leader
card.text: Creatures you control with no abilities get +1/+1. When this creature enters, up to one other target creature loses all abilities and becomes a Cleric creature with base power and toughness 3/3.

card.name: Weftwalker, Edge's Lost
card.text: Weftwalker can't be blocked. When Weftwalker enters, exile up to one other target nonland permanent until she leaves the battlefield. Whenever one or more permanents are exiled from the battlefield, put that many +1/+1 counters on Weftwalker.

card.name: Faceless, Disguise Expert
card.text: You may have Faceless enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield or any creature card in a graveyard, except it's a Hero in addition to its other types and it has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of it except it's a 1/1 and doesn't have this ability."

card.name: Godsclaw, Servant of Power
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Trample Whenever Godsclaw enters or attacks, discover 4. (Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 4 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Moon Mad, Unwilling Lunatic
card.text: If a spell or ability an opponent controls causes you to discard this card, put it onto the battlefield instead of putting it into your graveyard. Moon Mad attacks each turn if able. Creature spells and abilities of creature sources you control can't be countered.

card.name: Acrobat, Gymnastic Hero
card.text: During your turn, Acrobat has first strike and flying. Noncreature spells cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: The Heap, Walking Fen
card.text: Deathtouch If a creature would die, exile it instead. Whenever The Heap attacks, you may put two cards exiled with it on the bottom of their owner's library in a random order. If you do, you gain 1 life and draw a card.

card.name: The Centipede, Crawling Terror
card.text: Deathtouch When The Centipede enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Whenever The Centipede attacks, if there's five or more creature cards in your graveyard, he gets +5/+5 until end of turn.

card.name: Martyr, Former Ally
card.text: Whenever Martyr is dealt damage, she deals that much damage to target opponent. {4}{RW}: Until end of turn, whenever another creature you control is dealt damage, it deals that much damage to target opponent.

card.name: Umbra, the Devious Shadow
card.text: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Whenever Umbra deals combat damage to a player, put that many recon counters on it. {2}{UB}, Sacrifice Umbra: Mill X cards, where X is the number of recon counters on him. Put a card milled this way into your hand.

card.name: The Judge, Strict Arbiter
card.text: Flying, vigilance Each player can't cast more than one spell each turn. Each player can't draw more than one card each turn.

card.name: Bounding Strongman
card.text: Reach, trample When this creature enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: MANTLES OF ALCOMEX (MAX) MAX
card.text:
WU Flicker/leaves the battlefield without dying UB Saboteur BR Tactical (Pseudo-exalted as tactical can pour multiple abilities into one attacker) RG Roles GW Lifegain WB Alliance UR Second Draw (hi there TVN synergies) BG ‘Creature mastery' (2+ creature cards in grave) RW ‘Valorous' {G}{U} MV 4+ (hi there FLM synergies)
Mechanics Tactical (At the beginning of combat on your turn, if this creature doesn't have summoning sickness, you may tap it. If you do, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains the following abilities until end of turn.) Alliance — Whenever another creature you control enters Teamwork number (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may tap any number of creatures you control with total power number or more.)

card.name: Box of Scraps
card.text: When this artifact enters, draw a card. Whenever another artifact you control enters, put a charge counter on this artifact. {4}, {T}, Exile this artifact: You may put an artifact card with mana value equal to or less than the number of charge counters on this artifact from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Utility Belt
card.text: When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Okkult, Chaos Witch
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) At the beginning of your end step, if you cast one or more noncreature spells this turn, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile cards with total mana value X or greater, where X is the number of noncreature spells you cast this turn. You may cast any number of spells from among them without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Galebender Rescuer
card.text: Flash Flying When this creature enters, exile up to one other target creature. Return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step. If you controlled that creature, it enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Otherwise, it enters tapped.

card.name: Emerge from the Shadows
card.text: When this enchantment enters, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and can't be blocked this turn. Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to an opponent, that player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Strength Monger
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Monster Role token attached to up to one other target creature. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has trample.) During your turn, Roles you control have "Enchanted creature gets +1/+1."

card.name: Grim Piper
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, if you have two or more creature cards in your graveyard, create a 1/1 black Rat Hero creature token.

card.name: Street Dancer
card.text: Vigilance, menace Whenever you or a permanent you control becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Pristine Goonbot
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may discard a card. If you do, choose a target creature. Whenever that creature deals combat damage to a player this turn, you draw two cards.

card.name: Devious Duo
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 black Villain creature token. {2}{W}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create two 1/1 black Villain creature tokens.

card.name: Enforcer of the Will
card.text: Whenever another creature you control leaves the battlefield without dying, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. It can't be blocked this turn. {1}{W}{U}, Return another creature you control to its owner's hand: This creature gains lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Living Shadow
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. If it dealt 4 or more damage to that player, instead draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Martyr's Blood
card.text: Target creature you control deals X damage to any other target and X damage to itself and you gain X life, where X is its power.

card.name: Divine Abomination
card.text: Trample, lifelink This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.

card.name: Enhanced Crawler Swarm
card.text: As long as you've cast another spell with mana value 5 or greater this turn, you may cast this spell by paying {G}{U} instead of paying its mana cost. Vigilance When this creature enters, draw two cards.

card.name: Giggling Slasher
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters or dies, create a Killer Role token attached to up to one target creature. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +2/+0.)

card.name: Walking Exoskeleton
card.text: Deathtouch, reach When this creature enters, search your library for a creature card, put it into your graveyard, then shuffle.

card.name: Bearer of the Mooncurse
card.text: When this creature enters, you may create a Cursed Role token attached to a creature you control. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on that creature. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature is 1/1.) Whenever one or more enchanted creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Dark Fortress
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {B} or {R}. Activate only if this land entered this turn or if you control a basic land.

card.name: Gathering Place
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G} or {W}. Activate only if this land entered this turn or if you control a basic land.

card.name: Overclocked Power Plant
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. Activate only if this land entered this turn or if you control a basic land.

card.name: Austere Tower
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. Activate only if this land entered this turn or if you control a basic land.

card.name: Abundant Gardens
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. Activate only if this land entered this turn or if you control a basic land.

card.name: Helperbot V2
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card.

card.name: Arcane Refocus
card.text: Discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards plus one.

card.name: Practitioners of Forbidden Arts
card.text: Flash Flying

card.name: Charging Flamebelcher
card.text: Haste When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Runaway Pet
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, destroy up to one target artifact.

card.name: Acolyte of the Voice
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 2 life.

card.name: New Moon Disciple
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Healing Role token attached to target creature you control. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has lifelink.)

card.name: Combat Baton
Single-Celled Super-Evolver
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, if that creature has greater power or toughness than this creature, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Bathe in the Swamps
card.text: Mill four cards, then you may return a creature card from among them to your hand. If you don't put a card into your hand this way, gain 2 life.
